arts.ttl: Cody Gakpo reveals Liverpool fashion secrets and how he's 'way more chill'
arts.sum: Liverpool star Cody Gakpo says he's "way more chill" than his teammates when it comes to arriving at the training ground in style - but admits he does have a strong interest in the fashion industry. The Anfield club have proven that they are some of the best dressed in the game, projecting their personal styles and embracing their unique designs.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta sends Liverpool 'right place' warning: 'We're more than comfortable'
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is feeling confident ahead of his side's huge Premier League clash against Liverpool this weekend and has insisted they will be "flying"

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal and Liverpool are leading the race to sign 'phenomenal' £100m winger in 2025
RB Leipzig vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool make the trip to Germany to face RB Leipzig in the Champions League on Wednesday evening. The Reds have attained maximum points thus far in the competition, whilst their opponents are yet to get off the mark after two tough defeats. Lois Openda is a doubt for the hosts after the Belgian picked up […] The post RB Leipzig vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool set for Adidas kit switch as '£60m' figure likely to go far higher
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to switch from Nike to Adidas at the end of the current deal in 2025

arts.ttl: Everton get controversial Liverpool vs Chelsea referee they fumed over three times last season
arts.sum: Everton's next game at home to Fulham will be refereed by John Brooks, who was at the centre of controversy after all three Blues matches he took charge of last season

arts.ttl: How Arsenal could line up against Liverpool without five first-choice players
arts.sum: Arsenal could be without Buakyo Saka, Martin Odegaard, William Saliba, Riccardo Calafiori and Jurrien Timber against Liverpool

arts.ttl: When is Leipzig - Liverpool? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: RB Leipzig has had a mixed run, with wins over Mainz 2-0 and Heidenheim 1-0, but a loss to Juventus 2-3. Form guide for Leipzig - Liverpool

arts.ttl: Dominik Szoboszlai and Cody Gakpo drop early Liverpool team news hint for RB Leipzig clash
arts.sum: Arne Slot will be hoping Dominik Szoboszlai and Cody Gakpo can fire Liverpool to victory against RB Leipzig

arts.ttl: Liverpool defender to return to AXA Training Centre for treatment after huge injury blow
arts.sum: Liverpool youngster Luke Chambers has picked up an injury that will rule him out for months after an impressive start to his second loan spell with Wigan Athletic
